ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the audio file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio file in seconds */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_rate" INTEGER /* Bit rate of the audio file */,
  "channel_count" INTEGER /* Number of audio channels */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the audio file */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the audio file (e.g., field recording, user-generated content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file the feature belongs to */,
  "fsID" INTEGER /* Sampling frequency of the feature */,
  "start" REAL /* Start time of the feature in seconds */,
  "end" REAL /* End time of the feature in seconds */,
  "salience" REAL /* Salience of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., MFCC, Mel-spectrogram) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to extract the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio clip the label belongs to */,
  "classID" INTEGER /* Class ID of the label */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the label class (e.g., dog_bark, children_playing) */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number of the label */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the label */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the label */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the label was annotated */,
  "annotation_description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of the training process */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
